name: LitPol Link Failure
description: Loss of sole synchronous AC connection to Continental Europe. Baltics forced into island mode.

overrides.rationale: LitPol Link outage — overland line failure or sabotage

expected_impacts.LT: Loss of synchronous connection to Continental Europe. Grid frequency must be maintained internally.
expected_impacts.LV: No direct Continental connection. Relies on internal Baltic generation.
expected_impacts.EE: No direct Continental connection. Nordic links (Estlinks) become sole external connections.
expected_impacts.all: Baltic states operate in island mode. Emergency reserves activated. NordBalt becomes critical for Lithuanian supply.

historical_reference: No full outage precedent. BRELL desynchronization (Feb 2025) was planned; this scenario is unplanned.
